title: Phase 10: Benefit payment letter PDF export + employer notification templates (LC 3761)
description: Generate benefit payment letters as PDFs (TD/PD/advance) for examiners to download/send when benefits are issued, AND build employer notification templates required by California Labor Code section 3761 (employer's right to be notified of claim/benefit decisions). Outputs are factual GREEN-zone (citing regulation, listing payment amounts, dates, recipients). Must NOT contain legal advice or analysis.
acceptance_criteria: Benefit payment letter PDF generator (TD, PD, advance) — sent to claimant with cc to employer
Employer LC 3761 notification template (claim decision, benefit award, material development)
Backend route(s) to generate letter/notification PDFs for a given Payment/BenefitAward and Claim event
Frontend Download Letter button in relevant claim tab
Unit tests for letter content generators (assert text/structure passed to PDF lib)
Unit tests for LC 3761 notification builder (citation present, employer addressed correctly, claim/payment data populated)
Integration test for routes (auth, RBAC, returns PDF MIME type)
UPL compliance: factual recitations only, no legal advice
